S.FORM: == cait == śáłśéõ siwkay nu cait cait sa, pasiketen ku tuutuud i pabaw.tinaku , micait ku hata i culay, sibali sa mabahel tu ku hata. pacaiten ku hata i cabeng. tinaku a kamu pacait śáłśéõ i cabengen pacait ku tupel. pacaiten śčŅŚéĽŚźä pacaiten kiya zikuc! picaitan śČÄśáłśéõšĻčŤôē mipacek tu picaitan i cabeng ci Dungi. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika Suspension bondage is a form of sexual bondage where a bound person is hung from one or more overhead suspension points. Suspension bondage is considered to carry a higher risk than other forms of sexual bondage.
S.PHON: == ¶ait == ** siwkaj nu ¶ait ¶ait sa, pasik…ôt…ôn ku tuutuud i pabaw.tinaku , mi ¶ait ku ńßata i ¶ur~…ĺaj, sibar~…ĺi sa mabańß…ôr~…ĺ tu ku ńßata. pa ¶ait…ôn ku ńßata i ¶ab…ôŇč. tinaku a kamu pa ¶ait ** i ¶ab…ôŇč…ôn pa ¶ait ku tup…ôr~…ĺ. pa ¶ait…ôn *** pa ¶ait…ôn kija ziku ¶! pi ¶aitan ***** mipa ¶…ôk tu pi ¶aitan i ¶ab…ôŇč ¶i duŇči. u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika susp…ônsion bondag…ô is a form of s…ô*uar~…ĺ bondag…ô wńß…ôr…ô a bound p…ôrson is ńßuŇč from on…ô or mor…ô o*…ôrńß…ôad susp…ônsion points. susp…ônsion bondag…ô is ¶onsid…ôr…ôd to ¶arrj a ńßigńß…ôr risk tńßan otńß…ôr forms of s…ô*uar~…ĺ bondag…ô.
S.FORM: == cait == śáłśéõ siwkay nu cait cait sa, pasiketen ku tuutuud i pabaw.tinaku , micait ku hata i culay, sibali sa mabahel tu ku hata. pacaiten ku hata i cabeng. tinaku a kamu pacait śáłśéõ i cabengen pacait ku tupel. pacaiten śčŅŚéĽŚźä pacaiten kiya zikuc! picaitan śČÄśáłśéõšĻčŤôē mipacek tu picaitan i cabeng ci Dungi. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika Suspension bondage is a form of sexual bondage where a bound person is hung from one or more overhead suspension points. Suspension bondage is considered to carry a higher risk than other forms of sexual bondage.
